title: Amazon AWS Announces $100B AI Infrastructure Investment – Cloud Revenue Exceeds $30B Quarterly
shortdescription: World's largest cloud provider commits to building largest AI supercomputer cluster ever constructed.
description: AWS $100B investment deploys 2M GPUs, cloud revenue hits $30B quarterly with $80B in committed AI contracts.
author: Henry Willy

title: London Traders Hit by ‘King of Mangoes’ Shortage
shortdescription: London traders are facing a shortage of Alphonso mangoes, known as the “king of mangoes,” due to poor harvests in India and rising transport costs linked to Middle East tensions.
description: London traders are facing a shortage of Alphonso mangoes, known as the “king of mangoes,” due to poor harvests in India and rising transport costs linked to Middle East tensions.
author: Henrry Willy

title: Apple Stock Downgraded to 'Sell' After iPhone Sales Miss Q4 Estimates
shortdescription: AAPL down 5% pre-market as China market share drops to 18% from 22%.
description: Analysts cut price target to $180 – services revenue saves quarter but hardware weakness persists amid Huawei competition.
author: Henrry Willy
